must_have_quals: 2+ years of experience in an analytics role preferred, Bachelor's Degree in a highly numerate major (Math, Stats, Econ, etc.) or relevant experience in data and/or business analysis, Strong personal organizational and time management skills, Strong problem solving skills, allied with track record of transforming data into actionable business insights, Strong communication skills, and ability to present work to non-analytical stakeholders as well as other analysts, Ability to work in a fast paced environment with a lot of ambiguity, Proficiency in SQL and Excel required, Experience with Python desirable, Experience with Tableau desirable, Experience working in groups and leading smaller intra year projects
core_responsibilities: Work with other analysts to produce specific insights around customer behavior, trends, and drivers of business performance in FanDuel Casino, Create, modify and evolve models and data visualizations to better understand and explain the performance of various casino commercial KPIs, Create and maintain automated reporting processes visible to various casino and group wide teams, Present analyses to casino stakeholders, focusing on driving actionable insights, Field and fulfill various ad-hoc requests from different casino teams, Opportunity to mentor junior analysts on day to day requests as well as team best practices
job_summary: FanDuel Group is the premier mobile gaming company in the United States and Canada. They are seeking an Analyst to derive insights for group-wide and commercial teams, focusing on customer behavior and business performance in FanDuel Casino.
